title: Adventures of Little Herbert in Mushroom Land
original_title: Adventures of Little Herbert in Mushroom Land
overview: Small in size but big in heart, 10-year-old Herbert wants one thing above all else: to be good enough to play baseball with the other kids. Will a trip to a miniature mushroom kingdom, where he fights a giant slug, give him the confidence he needs?
